title: eleocharis ayacuchensis
intro: Eleocharis ayacuchensis, also known as Ayacucho Spike-rush, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Eleocharis ayacuchensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions or decoctions, and it can also be dried and powdered for use in teas, tinctures, or capsules.
